creator: john@saltant.com
text: antoine: Ah, then maybe I don't really understand the purpose that knob serves. The 20140607 CHANGES entry states, "If set to yes, the knob indicates that the port can be installed for different python versions at the same time." This port can do that, and you say it doesn't need the knob. I'll update the patch to remove 'concurrent' and take my questions about it to the mailing list.
